isEqual.isEmpty: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , URL FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND IMAGEPATH like '%SLIDERIMAGE%' ORDER BY SN
isEqual.isNotEmpty: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , URL FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN

select.isNotEqual: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , URL FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND ISUSE = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND IMAGEPATH like '%SLIDERIMAGE%' ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) > 0

SELECT ALERT , COMPLETE , BANSONG , CALLBACK , HESONG , (SELECT SAVEMAILFLAG FROM TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF WHERE UserID = #currentID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AS SAVEMAILFLAG, LINEPASS FROM TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF WHERE UserID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT '1' ALERT , '1' COMPLETE , '1' BANSONG , '1' CALLBACK , '1' HESONG , 'Y' SAVEMAILFLAG , '0' LINEPASS FROM DUAL
SELECT '0' ALERT , '0' COMPLETE , '0' BANSONG , '0' CALLBACK , '0' HESONG , 'N' SAVEMAILFLAG FROM DUAL
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ) <> 0

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_PWDINFO SET FLAG = #v_PFLAG#, PWD = #v_PPWD#, PWDTYPE = #v_PPWDTYPE# WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
UPDATE TBL_PWDINFO SET FLAG = #v_PFLAG# WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PWDINFO SET FLAG = #v_PFLAG#, PWDTYPE = #v_PPWDTYPE# WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PWDINFO ( USERID, FLAG, PWD, PWDTYPE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #v_PUSERID#, #v_PFLAG#, #v_PPWD#, #v_PPWDTYPE#, #tenantID#, #companyID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF ( USERID, ALERT, COMPLETE, BANSONG, CALLBACK, HESONG, SAVEMAILFLAG, TENANT_ID, LINEPASS ) VALUES ( #v_PUSERID#, #v_PALERT#, #v_PCOMPLETE#, #v_PBANSONG#, #v_PCALLBACK#, #v_PHESONG#, #v_PSAVEMAILFLAG#, #tenantID#, #linePass# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_APPROVNOTIMAILCONF SET ALERT = #v_PALERT#, COMPLETE = #v_PCOMPLETE#, BANSONG = #v_PBANSONG#, CALLBACK = #v_PCALLBACK#, HESONG = #v_PHESONG#, SAVEMAILFLAG = #v_PSAVEMAILFLAG#, LINEPASS = #linePass# WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMSEQ FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE USERID = #v_pUserID# AND ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT ( ITEMSEQ, USERID, RESULT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pItemSeq#, #v_pUserID#, #v_pResult#, #tenantID# )

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ( COMPANYID = UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#) OR COMPANYID = 'Top' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , NVL(EndDate, to_date('1900-01-01', 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')) EndDate FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ( COMPANYID = UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#) OR COMPANYID = 'Top' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , ENDDATE FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , NVL(ENDDATE, to_date('1900-01-01', 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')) EndDate FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ( COMPANYID = UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#) OR COMPANYID = 'Top' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pTotal# - #v_pStart# ) temp ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ITEMSEQ , STARTDATE , POLLSELECTIONCOUNT , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , ANSWER1 , ANSWER2 , ANSWER3 , ANSWER4 , ANSWER5 , ANSWER6 , ANSWER7 , ANSWER8 , ANSWER9 , ANSWER10 , NVL(B.RESULT, 0) Result FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL A LEFT JOIN TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMSEQ = B.ITEMSEQ AND USERID = #v_pUserID# WHERE COMPANYID = UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#) AND STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY A.ITEMSEQ DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT ID , NAME FROM TBL_PS_WEBPARTGROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT ID , NAME FROM TBL_PS_WEBPARTGROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top'

sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMSEQ FROM TBL_PS_USERWEBPART WHERE USERID = #v_PUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )

SELECT NAME, URL, DEFAULTPOSITION AS POSITION, DEFAULTPRIORITY, ID FROM TBL_PS_WEBPARTITEM A JOIN TBL_PS_WEBPARTITEMACL B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID='S907000' OR COMPANYID='Top') AND DEFAULTUSE=1 AND ACCESSID IN ('gisa1','top','Top','S907000','RAB1') ORDER BY DEFAULTPOSITION, DEFAULTPRIORITY

SELECT B.NAME, B.URL, A.ITEMPOSITION AS POSITION, A.ITEMSEQ, B.ID FROM TBL_PS_USERWEBPART A JOIN TBL_PS_WEBPARTITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ID JOIN TBL_PS_WEBPARTITEMACL C ON C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND C.ITEMID=B.ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.USERID='gisa1' AND C.ACCESSID IN ('gisa1','top','Top','S907000','RAB1') ORDER BY A.ITEMPOSITION, A.ITEMSEQ

SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.TITLE , A.TITLE2 , A.DESCRIPTION , A.DESCRIPTION2 , B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FilePath , A.CN FROM TBL_PS_EMPMONTH A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE TERM = #v_PTERM# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# ORDER BY TERM DESC

SELECT ITEMSEQ , WIDTH , HEIGHT , POSITION FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE ( COMPANYID = 'Top' OR COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# ) AND STARTDATE <= to_date(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE >= to_date(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND INUSE = 1

SELECT A.QUICKLINKID QuickLinkID , QUICKLINKNAME , QUICKLINKNAME2 , QUICKLINKNAME3 , LINKTYPE , LINKTYPEURL , URL , REGUSERID , VIEW_FLAG , SIZE_ FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK A JOIN TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL B ON A.QUICKLINKID = B.QUICKLINKID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.REGDATE DESC
SELECT RESULT , COUNT(RESULT) COUNT FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RESULT ORDER BY COUNT DESC, RESULT ASC

SELECT ITEMSEQ , STARTDATE , NVL(ENDDATE, to_date('1900-01-01', 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS')) EndDate , POLLSELECTIONCOUNT , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , ANSWER1 , ANSWER2 , ANSWER3 , ANSWER4 , ANSWER5 , ANSWER6 , ANSWER7 , ANSWER8 , ANSWER9 , ANSWER10 FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT RESULT , COUNT(RESULT) COUNT FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RESULT ORDER BY RESULT
SELECT PASSWORD FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #cn#
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TITLE, TITLE2, ITEMSEQ FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY POSTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

isEqual.isNotEmpty: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE (COMPANYID = 'Top' OR COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#
isEqual.isEmpty: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = 'Top' OR CompanyID = 'S907000') ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#

isNotEqual.isNotEmpty: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = 'Top' OR COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID#) ORDER BY ITEMSEQ ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pTotal - v_pStart# ) TEMPTBLNOTICE ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#
isNotEqual.isEmpty: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = 'Top' OR CompanyID = 'S907000') ORDER BY ITEMSEQ ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pTotal - v_pStart# ) TEMPTBLNOTICE ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.OWNERID AS OWNERID, A.SHAREUSERID AS SHAREUSERID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME END AS SHAREUSERNAME, A.SHAREDATE AS SHAREDATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS SHAREUSERTITLE, B.DEPARTMENT AS SHAREUSERDEPTID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE B.DESCRIPTION END AS SHAREUSERDEPTNAME, A.TENANTID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL A JOIN tbl_usermaster B ON A.TENANTID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.SHAREUSERID = B.CN WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND OWNERID = #userID# AND SHAREUSERDEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID#) ORDER BY SHAREDATE
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL SELECT #userID#, CN, DISPLAYNAME, TO_DATE(#shareDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TITLE, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, #tenantID# FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #shareUserID#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND OWNERID = #userID#
#shareUserID[]#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(SHAREUSERID) FROM TBL_PS_SHAREAPPROVAL WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND OWNERID = #userID# AND SHAREUSERID = #shareUserID#

SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM tbl_ps_popup_user WHERE itemseq = #itemSeq# AND companyid = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ( (user_type = 'USER' AND user_id = #userId#) OR (user_type = 'DEPT' AND subdept_permitted = 0 AND (user_id = #deptId# or user_id IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#))) OR (user_type = 'JIKWI' AND user_id IN ( SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# ) ) OR (user_type = 'JIKWI' AND user_id IN ( SELECT jobid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) ) OR (user_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#)) )

SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(dept_cd_path, (SELECT LISTAGG (dept_cd_path, '|') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY DEPT_CD_PATH) AS DEPT_CD_PATH FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn IN ( SELECT user_id FROM tbl_ps_popup_user WHERE itemseq = #itemSeq# AND user_type = 'DEPT' AND subdept_permitted = 1 )
) ) AND ( cn = #deptId# OR cn IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )
SELECT user_id FROM tbl_ps_popup_user WHERE itemseq = #itemSeq# AND companyid = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND user_type = 'GROUP'
SELECT main_type as mainType, sub_type as subType, platform FROM tbl_user_noti_disable_item WHERE user_id = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT main_type as mainType, sub_type as subType, platform FROM tbl_user_noti_disable_item WHERE user_id = #userId# AND main_type = #mainType# AND sub_type = #subType# AND platform = #platform# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_user_noti_disable_item WHERE user_id = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO tbl_user_noti_disable_item (user_id, main_type, sub_type, platform, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #items[].mainType#, #items[].subType#, #items[].platform#, #tenantId#)
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
